title: Hellay's Redone Endermans x Fresh Compats
description: Fixes endermans not having face when Hellay's Redone Endermans installed alongside Fresh Compats
body:
# [Hellay's Redone Endermans x FA](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redone-endermans-fa) x [Fresh Compats](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-compats) ### Load Order ![Load Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5b35a3bcae7ffe4f3b448180cf85776c341e651.png) # [Fresh Compats](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-compats) fixes a issue where enderman head from Supplementaries won't have eyes if [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) is installed. But this fix unfortunately results in Hellay's Endermans not having a face. This pack exactly fixes that.
